description: Use this API to set the definition of an area subsystem. This can be used to toggle a particular area subsystem on or off. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = asysdef(sid, defined)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Valid area subsystem id. valid area subsystem ids range from 0 to 11. (input).

parameters.name: defined
parameters.description: Flag used to mark the area subsystem as undefined/defined. (input).

defined.description: mark the area subsystem as undefined.
mark the area subsystem as defined.
